sessions.summary: Iterate jira Claude Code plugin v1.1.0 → v1.2.0 → v1.3.0: bucket picker UX, AskUserQuestion integration, proactive session-end reminder
accomplishments: Did: Shipped v1.1.0 — 3-bucket picker (2h/4h/8h/other) as default input mode, PROACTIVE clause in skill description, new /jira:setup skill that appends # Jira Worklog reminder to ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md idempotently
Did: Ran Supreme Council + product-manager subagent to design signal-based time estimation algorithm and delivery plan
Did: v1.2.0 — replaced fake TUI picker with plain chat text-reply parser after user pointed out chat is text-only
Did: v1.3.0 — replaced text-reply parser with native AskUserQuestion tool (interactive button cards) with signal-highlighted (Recommended) default
Did: Merged 3 plugin repo PRs (#8, #9, #10) and 3 marketplace PRs (#89, #91)
Did: Logged 3 worklogs to CXCDP-41301 totaling 9h across the plugin build (2h + 3h + 4h)
nextSteps: Dogfood v1.3.0 for a week; observe team feedback before v1.4.0
Optional v1.4.0: auto-compose worklog comment from commit messages, multi-ticket detection, exercise signal-based mode path
Fold /jira:log-work + /connectors-vault:learn into private /wrap skill; evaluate team wrap-team plugin later
